instance_reference.note: Per-accelerator-hour figures derived from the whole-instance hourly list price divided by 8 GPUs.

price_note: LIST PRICES only, as published or derived from public vendor price pages; negotiated enterprise discounts, capacity-block deals, and neocloud offers (often far lower) are NOT reflected. Spot prices are dynamic snapshots. Prices change without notice; hot-update this file by editing the numbers and bumping provenance.date_accessed.
energy_note: Electricity sub-term uses assumed_avg_utilization x tdp_watts x assumed_pue x electricity_usd_per_kwh. utilization, PUE (AWS does not publish fleet PUE; 1.15 is an assumption) and the $0.10/kWh industrial-power ballpark are ASSUMPTIONS, not measurements.

prices.derivation: p5.48xlarge $55.04/hr / 8 GPUs (post June-2025 ~44% AWS price cut)
p5.48xlarge ~$38.53/hr 1-year savings-plan rate / 8 GPUs (~30% off on-demand)
p5.48xlarge $19.785/hr current spot snapshot / 8 GPUs; spot is dynamic and P5 spot capacity is scarce in practice

tdp.note: NVIDIA H100 SXM datasheet TDP 700W (official vendor specification).

pue.note: ASSUMPTION. AWS does not publish fleet-average PUE.
